title: anthyllis vulneraria var. maritima
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. maritima, also known as maritime kidney vetch or sea kidney vetch, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate wound healing. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. maritima are attributed to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to the skin to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
